list.name: request_id
list.label: Request ID
list.description: Filter the log panel below to a single request_id (from a StructuredLogger entry's requestId field, or the x-request-id response header — see apps/api/src/common/logger/logger.service.ts). Leave as .* to show everything.

list.name: container
list.label: Container
list.description: Matches docker-compose container names / apps/k8s deployment `app` labels — see monitoring/promtail-config.yml and apps/k8s/promtail-daemonset.yaml for how this label is set.

panels.title: Error-level log volume by service
panels.description: count_over_time of level="error" lines, split by container. A sustained rise here is a leading indicator worth checking against monitoring/grafana/dashboards/carsauto-overview.json's error-rate panel and Sentry (docs/ERROR-TRACKING.md) — this shows EVERY error-level log line (including ones a 4xx-excluding Sentry filter would never see), that dashboard shows request-level 5xx rate.

panels.title: Logs (filter by Request ID above)
panels.description: Full structured log lines. Use the Request ID variable above to trace every log line a single HTTP request produced across api/worker — the x-request-id response header on any API call is the value to paste in. See apps/api/src/common/logger/logger.service.ts's requestMiddleware() for how request_id is generated and propagated.
